[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized anime-style character stands in front of a gray, outdoor scene with large black text reading “Svbahu” and a red heart graphic at the top right.

Main Subject:
In the left foreground, an anime-style girl with long dark gray hair and bangs stands facing forward, her body slightly angled to the right. She has a pale face with small dot-like eyes and a neutral expression. She wears a light-colored, puffy outfit with darker accents around the chest area, and a wide, dark belt-like band at her waist; a darker strap or detail runs over her clothing. Her hair has a slight wave and falls down past her shoulders. A small area of lighter decoration or patterning is visible on her hair and outfit.

Setting:
The background is a grayscale, foggy or misty outdoor scene, showing tree silhouettes and what looks like a snowy or icy ground with faint structures or distant objects. The composition places the character on the left while the background occupies most of the frame.

Visual Details:
The image has a soft, washed-out look in the background. Lighting appears diffuse with low contrast. The large black calligraphic text “Svbahu” dominates the upper right portion. A red heart shape with a glossy highlight sits near the top right, partially overlapping the text area. The character is drawn with clean linework and muted pastel tones compared with the darker, high-contrast text.

Visible Text:
Svbahu

Practical Summary:
The image shows an anime-style girl standing on the left against a misty grayscale outdoor background. Large black text reading “Svbahu” and a red heart appear on the right side of the image.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

Svbau

# Structured Version

- **Text shown (likely part of a longer word):** `Svbau`

# Notes

- The large text in the image appears to be partially cut/overlapped by the character/artwork. The extracted text is **“Svbau”** as visible. The beginning/end of the intended word may be obscured.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
